headline: Decrypt and export the audit log
summary: Admins can download the decrypted audit trail in CSV, JSON, or CADF format for investigation, SIEM ingestion, or compliance.

items.title: Audit log export
items.body: Export the decrypted audit trail from the audit viewer, honoring the current search and date filters. Choose CSV (formula-injection-safe, for spreadsheets), JSON (the full structured entries), or CADF — a Cloud Auditing Data Federation event batch that SIEM and compliance tooling can ingest. Each export is admin-gated and is itself recorded in the audit log.
